g.text: Read the summons under the sign.
See to supplies in the market first.
Go straight in to the taproom.
Cross the square toward the well talk.
Stop at the roadside shrine a moment.
Ask the gate watchman what he has seen.
Take the summons inside to the company t...
Decide the marsh is someone elses errand...
Head in to the taproom with the news.
Buy lamp oil for the brass lantern.
Buy eel line and a grapple.
Carry the oil jar to the inn.
Carry the coil to the inn.
Take what you heard to the inn.
Size up the redcloak swords at the bar.
Go back to the company table.
Listen to the fiddlers new Harrowstone v...
Race the redcloaks south this same hour.
Let them ride and plan it right.
Join the table and spread the map.
Look in on the stable first.
Talk the plan through with Pell.
Order supper and eat while you plan.
Help Pell shift the flooded cellar kegs.
Ask the drovers about the south fords.
Hear Pips riddle about the marsh.
Let old Maren read the lantern flame.
Shift the kegs the careful way.
Rush the job and wrench your back.
Take the reports back to Pell.
Start with Bram at his forge wagon.
Study Heddas map scrap over the bar.
Hear Pells warning about the fen.
Square your shoulders and go find Bram.
Let the company rest on its one victory.
Offer a full share and gate money.
Give him the plain truth of the taken.
Pick up the spare hammer and help first.
Stand him an ale and talk shield work.
Close the bargain on the anvil.
Push too hard when he hesitates.
Push too hard when he hesitates.
Ask him once, with the work done.
Push too hard when he hesitates.
Go find Sable on the roof ridge.
Dice for it, letter against commission.
Read the fences letter at her shoulder.
Counter the offer, first pick and first ...
Bet her she cannot walk the ridge blind.
Let the dice settle it clean.
Point at the snake seal and say nothing.
Read the seal aloud to the street.
Talk fast and get off the roof.
Leave the offer to sit and turn away.
Snatch the letter to force the choice.
Turn in for one real night of sleep.
Go to Elowen at her aunts shop.
Vouch for her to aunt Aldous yourself.
Ask Elowen what she wants, plainly.
Sign the shop ledger as her bond.
Bristle at the old womans terms.
Take the list with good grace.
Take the list and the lecture both.
Promise her the truth the whole way.
Soften it, and let her hear the lie.
Go to Hedda for the commission.
Set the brass lantern on the table and a...
Accept the commission with a plain hand.
Ask for Tallows cart for the south leg.
Ask why the redcloaks were hired too.
Roll south for the fords at first light.
Take the downs path over shepherd countr...
Take passage on Wecks river barge.
Walk the drover droves through the carrl...
Chase the dust plume on the downs first.
Work the weir walk shortcut past the lan...
Follow the stray bell note over the carr...
Go the long way around the toll camp.
Face the redcloaks down at the stile.
Run the fallows shortcut past them.
Talk to the shepherd watching it all.
Chance the boggy cut below the stile.
Crest the downs by the gorse line.
Cut back to the shepherds lane.
Hold your ground until they blink.
Let Bram step forward and settle it.
Clear the wall and keep running.
Turn and face the dogs in the open.
Take the shepherds lane down to the fen.
Study the drowned bell tower first.
Follow the lane to the fen edge road.
Walk it off down to the fen edge.
Ride the barge and pump Weck for news.
Take poling lessons at the stern.
Help the eel boy with the pots.
Swing the kit ashore at Saltmire stage.
Ride to the last bend for the long view.
Doze off to Wecks talk mid river.
Land at the stage, blisters and all.
Ask Weck about the old charm he hums.
Jump the gap with the kit balanced.
Toss the kit across first, carelessly.
Put ashore at the crow trees.
Walk the bank while Weck ties up.
Keep to the drove lane itself.
Cut across the open carrland sedge.
Count the wheel marks properly first.
Stay on the ruts to the ford.
Follow the ruts onto the black pool plan...
Push through to the old ford.
Slip through the hedge away from the pac...
Crawl the shivering ground flat and slow...
Sprint the last stretch before it opens.
Check the stones old carvings first.
Cross fast without sounding the water.
Leap back off the soft plank.
Trust the plank one more step.
Wring out and make the fen edge road.
Vanish through the hedge gap and lie sti...
Outrun the ponies on the straight.
Watch what the crows avoid upstream.
Read the pole tracks at the mud line.
Circle the wreck wide and watch first.
Walk the perimeter for dropped things.
Say fen words over the spilled catch.
Check the reed bank the crows shun.
Follow the pole tracks south now.
Close on the reed bank quietly.
Throw a stone and see what rises.
Check the reed bank before leaving.
Follow the tracks south at once.
Cast wider for the small boots.
Move in on the reed bank.
Answer the two note call and go in.
Push south hard along the pole trail.
Push on through the flooded reach.
Come out on the far bank and cast about.
Bind the wound and take his story.
Carry him until his legs come back.
Answer his challenge with the lantern.
Give him Elowens fen herbs first.
Send word back to Weck downriver.
Learn the marsh calls and move.
Set him down at the hamlet path.
Let him take the companys measure.
Tell the lantern story short and true.
Take the mud oath and the calls.
Take the headwomans floor for the night.
Go over every strap and buckle.
Argue for beating the storm south.
Climb the old burial mound for the view.
Trade news with the peat cutters.
Start clean in the morning mist.
Take the marked pole trail south.
Take the trail and make up time.
Set out with the kit squared away.
Water the ponies at the old corral first...
Go now and race the black weather.
Set out wiser in the morning.
Sit with the map over the fire first.
Follow the rag knots at a fen pace.
Let Reed sound the lane ahead.
Send a decoy splash down a side channel.
Push on into the dark to gain a march.
Wade the flooded dip on the line.
Guess a shortcut off the rag line.
Keep the slow pace to the crannog.
Pause at the singing mere Reed names.
Push on toward the crannog smoke.
Rest cold at the burned platform.
Search the Coil leavings for papers.
Wade on to the crannog landing.
Follow where Col points, into the deep m...
Take the high esker road and bridges.
Light the lantern and take the grange sl...
Go under the moss by the peat galleries.
Bluff the patrols in gray hoods.
Time the sweeps and wade the gaps.
Study the parapet line for cover first.
Listen to the patrol horns pattern.
Walk the narrow like you belong.
Take the pair down quiet instead.
Overplay the bluff with a Coil sign.
Wade the stretch inside the window.
Borrow the supply skiff at its mooring.
Cut the horn down first, loudly wrong.
Check the chain locker under the stones.
Slog the margin the whole way.
Rest on the dry hummock first.
Walk the last mile to the ring wall.
Take the mile in borrowed hoods.
Gain the far parapet and push on.
Pole the skiff to the water gate.
Come up on the ring wall unremarked.
Slog back and take the long margin.
Swim the black lagoon for the hour saved...
Cross the broken stilt bridge first.
Scramble the collapsed scarp with the ge...
Round the scarp by the gull ledge.
Take the old pilgrim stair marked on the...
Wait for dusk and walk the crest dark.
Glass the whole road from the first ridg...
Lash planks and bridge the gap.
Climb down and around the broken span.
Turn back and pick another road.
Check the old beacon bracket above the s...
Scramble it loaded and save the hour.
Rope the gear up in stages.
Toss the packs up the scarp first.
Follow the boot print owner slow.
Take the ledge quick past the nests.
Edge past the gull colony at a hush.
Cross last and pull the planks after.
Climb on to the crest, breath rationed.
Ride the gravel slide to save time.
Pass the platform on its blind side.
Rush the ladder and bundle the sentry.
Wait below for the watch change.
Crouch on under the floor slats.
Leave the fire burning and move.
Use the change and walk through it.
Cut straight down the scarp now.
Walk south under the relief minute.
Walk the dry run by lantern light.
Feel the dark run to save the oil.
Crawl the side drain past the flood.
Tap the walls for the hollow line.
Check the old sluice dam machinery.
Read the grange marks at the mouth.
Map the junctions as you go.
Copy the tally scratched by the door.
Wade the flooded run in the dark.
Walk the eel run slow and loose.
Whistle to test the echo ahead.
Strike a light for just one look.
Push the unmapped forks on the count.
Climb the iron ladder to the grate.
Take the mouth that breathes cold.
Push through to the cistern ladder.
Walk it slow to the far side.
Kick free when the cables tighten.
Press on by your own reckoning.
Rest at the warm kiln chamber.
Deal with the hired dig crew ahead.
Thread the old workings around them.
Read the kilns for who fired them.
Sound out the rival cutters first.
Take the straight run to the brick face.
Read the kiln tenders tally stick first.
Pass the crew as hired diggers.
Detour by the sweet aired old cuts.
Take the deep unpropped cut around.
Listen to the diggers work song first.
Thread the old cuts on Elowens chalk.
Squeeze the roof fall gap ahead.
Come up the cutters shaft at the wall.
Slip past to the terrace grate ladder.
Pocket the wage slates for proof.
Climb the grate ladder to the terrace.
Come up inside sight of the ring wall.
Squeeze the gap while it holds.
Work the wall line to the pen grate.
Burrow into the wet reed sledge.
Sound Reeds all clear and walk across.
Chance the open pavement at a sprint.
Slip through the old shell midden yard.
Watch the water gate lamp a while first.
Slip the shell midden door in the angle.
Work the bar of the water gate side door...
Hurry past the hound pen upwind.
Cross by the sledges shadow to the stair...
Slip the midden door as the sledge halts...
Ride the sledge all the way to the kenne...
Work the side doors bar from above.
Read the whole terrace before moving.
Sound the sentrys own horn for cover.
Check the old well head by the platform.
Cross to the descending stair unremarked...
Ease the door and enter the dark.
Go down by the route you chalked.
Read the old marks around the arch first...
Start down the coiling stair toward the ...
Go east toward the pens and the cough.
Follow the thread of song to the grotto.
Stay for the whole plan, every word.
Shift for a better view through the latt...
Read the ledger open on his camp desk.
Slip down as the court breaks up.
Watch Gorses face one moment more.
Drop to the court floor early.
Fall in behind the plunder porters.
Slip down as the court breaks up.
Count his pacing like a jailers rounds.
Take the side arch into the old dark.
Trust the chute and skip the brake.
Go down the bell shaft rope.
Shadow the relays down the stair.
Send Sable ahead to map the floor.
Brake hard and land in the antechamber.
Surf the shell heap to save your boots.
Follow the cold passage to the note.
Swing wide to skip the last courses.
Peel into the side vault at the landing.
Hold in the column one flight more.
Crawl the drain gutter under the floor.
Push a loaded shell barrow through.
Detour by the drained side aisle.
Check the brine vats for another way.
Read the tide clock before choosing.
Slip through dry mouthed and empty hande...
Pocket two jars for the prisoners.
Sample the Coil mead, one swallow.
Crawl on to the stand up end.
Stand up early where the slab looks loos...
Park the barrow and slip the last stretc...
Push the barrow through the far arch.
Cut behind the brine vats instead.
Answer the work signal and walk in.
Wait for the signal to pass, then move.
Come out at the pens gallery.
Lift the keys above the warders hat.
Let Sable pick the second grate.
Take Martas whisper through the bars fir...
Wait out the relief and lose the hour.
Have Sable spring the hound pen for nois...
Lift the floor grate and map from below.
Open the grates one by one.
Open the far cells first, quietly.
Hurry the ring off its hook.
Open the grates on greased hinges.
Free them all, near cells first.
Take her muster name by name.
Whisper the plan in the empty cell.
Light the pen lamps to work faster.
Set the plan before the tide clock fills...
Hide them in the drained font vault.
Hide them in the choir loft above.
Move them to the sluice grate now.
Let them rush the gate armed as they are...
Split the party, two and two.
Swear the pen to Martas freight oath.
Set the signal and go to the gallery.
Seat the lid true and airless.
Set the signal and take the stairs.
Climb back and make for the gallery.
Let the child rest at the wall turn.
Go on to the gallery without her.
Come up and make for the gallery.
Borrow a sconce torch against the dark.
Walk the gallery screen behind the feast...
Cross the roof trusses above the smoke.
Thread the forge annex by hammer noise.
Check the stacked boxes by the door firs...
Listen to the officers table a while.
Shuffle the screen past the champion.
Rush the gap between feeding shifts.
Lift the champions boat hook for a troph...
Freeze when the hall hound circles near.
Cross plate to plate without stopping.
Rest at the kingpost and read the hall.
Jump the gap where two trusses part.
Time each step to the hammer blows.
Learn his rhythm first, then cross.

Go through to the plunder vault.
Go through to the plunder vault.
Drop to the vault side and go in.
Finish the crossing to the vault.
Come out at the tackle store.

Come out at the tackle store.

Read the lead tablets in the last lot.
Try the barred inner vault door.
Read the chain rig and pull its pin.
Weigh the lamp oil as a weapon.
Carry off an armful of dive gear.
Take the service stair toward the court.
Leave the tablets and take the stair.
Stay reading one tablet too long.
Copy the cipher marks for Elowen.
Pocket the pulley pin and take the stair...
Slick the store floor with oil first.
Leave the oil and take the stair.
Pass the novice cells on the slate count...
Cross the bell tackle gallery above.
Read the incense smoke drift first.
Study the shell wards before touching on...
Slip past on the posted count.
Leave Elowens hush mark on the arch.
Cross quick between the labeled ropes.
Steady yourself on a labeled rope.
Walk the fallen organ pipe dry.
Try a racked bone flute against the song...
Watch the novice at her tide chart first...
Go on with the hush mark working.
Go back and thicken the chalk line.
Slide down to the singers passage.
Drop to the passage, rope and all.
Pad on to the singers den.
Step off the pipe at the den mouth.
Lift the coral key from the ward hook.
Step out and parley with the Whisper.
Rush the hook and take the key by speed.
Back out and go keyless to the court.
Touch the chattering wards to still them...
Wrap the key and slip out.
Glance into her tide glass bowl.
Pay her price and take the key.
Decline the price and part friendly.
Ask the bowl your own question.
Trade her the temples gossip instead.
Run for the court stairs with it.
Turn at the door for one look back.
Take the long way to the court.
Climb to the choir loft lattice.

Climb to the choir loft lattice.
Take the loft stairs two at a time.

Strike the folio from his hands.

Count heads in the ditch and move.
Stop to wrap the humming stone mid run.
Take the road home to Barrowmere.

March everyone home under a hired captai...
Walk the last miles into dawn.
Set a candle at the fen wifes vigil.
Draw out the off duty sergeant.
Get pulled into mending the trough wall.
Take the temples old name to the inn.
Take the bell reports to the inn.
Buy the snake etched float and go in.

Cool the ride and take their fen lore in...
Give the vengeance ride your blessing.
Take the song with grace and find Pell.
Let the dwarf talk himself aboard.
Push too hard when he hesitates.
Stake the week and watch her win it.
Welsh when she names the stake.
Back her answer against her aunt.
Let the aunt shut the question down.
Take the fords road behind the redcloaks...
Head down to the fen edge road.
Stay for the shepherds last word.
Carry the warning to the fen edge.
Put ashore at the last bend.
Take the supply line reading to the ford...
Hail the shepherd across the sedge.
Make the fen edge road by his directions...
Slip to the reed bank the long way.
Wave the company forward in the open.
Walk the guide to Saltmire hamlet.

Go back down and square the gear.
Squeeze into the stone passage itself.

Add a marsh call to sell the decoy.
Cross the attic joist to joist.
Pause at the gable and listen first.
Hurry the loose slates at a trot.
Drop behind the patrol and push on.

Use the password on the next patrol.
Wade the arch line under the road.
Come up cold at the ring wall.
Climb the stair a boot at a time.
Push the pace past the nests.

Follow the hollow line to the main run.

Watch the otter run the dam first.
Take the straight run past the kilns.
Pay Coalfingers price for the back ways.
Haggle him down one measure too far.
Come up the cutters shaft at the wall.
Thread the racks past the sleeper.

Ride the windlass down to the ledge.
Swing wide to skip the last courses.
Come out at the pens gallery.

Use the noise and open the grates now.
Wait out the chase one round more.

Take the gallery stairs with Sable.
Shift the casks the patient way.
Climb the stack and take the top route.
Slip through to the vault side.
Leave the silver and take the stair.
Lift the bar and try the strongroom.
Cross the steam by count and go.

Press on to the last curtain.
Slip into the den low and quiet.

Herd the flames wider before you move.

Read the worn strokes with a wet thumb.
Leave a coin and go to the taproom.
Keep the shrine watch past curfew.
Carry the thirteenth space to the inn.
Pay the copper and find Pell.
Take the word choir to Bram.
Roll south with the tide table.

Chase it past the second valley.
Bank the news and make the fen edge.

Pay the hour and lift traps.
Walk the plank line fast through the fog...
Ask what the Coil fears about water.

Bend away from it like the droves do.
Send one scout toward it, no more.
Make the fen edge road by dusk.
Check the reed bank and move on.
Hear the story to its end.
Take the trail with the arithmetic done.
Follow the dog to the crannog.
Wait the lights out in the parapet shado...
Follow the lights for a closer look.
Come up on the ring wall.
Pass beneath in the hunting hour.

Map the echoes with finger snaps.

Play one more round to be sure.

Trade one more breath of names.
Pass the word down the relay.
Start the freeing at the key board.
Tap one more question down the line.

Take the service stair with the mark.

Flip it once in triumph first.

Set the signal and go to the gallery.
Carry the ledger line down the stairs.

Walk the narrows behind their backs.
Watch one more throw from cover.
Push on to the ring wall.

Coil the old rope onto your pack.
Go like an otter, kit dragged behind.

Hum the answer line and pass as crew.
Sing out on the next call to be sure.
Deliver the round on the clocks minute.

Hold her eyes and back away slow.

Set the lit lantern between you.
